De-icing Rock Salt

Coarse Siwa rock salt that lowers the freezing point of water on roads.

← Back to products

De-icing Rock Salt

Coarse-graded rock salt from Siwa, used to lower the freezing point of water on highways, airport runways and critical infrastructure. Graded for specific durability and grain size to deliver fast, reliable ice melt even under heavy traffic.

Key features

  • Coarse grain for long-lasting surface coverage
  • Fast, reliable ice and snow melt
  • Durable under traffic and abrasion
  • Compatible with standard spreading equipment
  • Supplied in bulk and 1-ton big bags
  • ISO 9001:2015 certified production

Specifications

Purity
97 - 99%+
Moisture
≤ 1.5%
Granule
0–12 mm (coarse)

Packaging

  • Bulk
  • 25 kg bags
  • 1 ton big bags
Request this product

Video tour

Applications

Highways
Airport runways
Bridges and overpasses
Industrial yards
